match.userMessage: Make the background a sunset gradient

fixtures._comment: frontend-tools 'Sunset' pill — 1st leg: emit change_background tool call only. NB: do NOT include `content` here. agent_framework_openai's ChatCompletions client splits an assistant message that carries BOTH `content` and `tool_calls` into two separate history entries (one with content, one with tool_calls), so on the follow-up leg aimock sees the standalone content message and re-matches THIS fixture by `userMessage` substring → another change_background tool call → infinite loop. The toolCallId-keyed follow-up fixture immediately above provides the post-tool narration text.
